"We are not moving fast and breaking things.
We are building things that last."

The Problem

We are connected,
but we are exhausted.

Digital contact degrades connection. LinkedIn rewards self-promotion. Zoom calls increase cognitive load. We have 1,000 connections and no one to have coffee with.

Grid-view meetings force excessive eye gaze, draining mental energy with every call.

Virtual backgrounds and digital profiles replace authentic presence with curated performance.

The most valuable professional relationships still begin with physical proximity.

How It Works

Proximity is the new algorithm.

Gravity detects professionals near you — in real time, in real space. No feeds, no likes, no content. Just the people around you, and the chance to connect.

500 ft
01

Enter a Venue

Walk into any professional space — a conference, coworking hub, or industry event. Gravity activates automatically.

02

See Who's Nearby

A proximity radar reveals other professionals within range — their role, expertise, and distance. No scrolling required.

03

Connect In Person

Request a connection. Walk over. Shake hands. The relationship starts with presence — not a notification.
